source: Item 17 summary table (pages 56-65), Items 5-12 (pages 15-50), state addenda (pages 78-93)
note: Contract burden extracted from Item 17 disclosure summary and cross-referenced with Items 5-12. Full agreement text (Exhibits D-2/D-3, pages 163-350) was not read clause-by-clause; Item 17 provides the required summary.

grant_and_term.renewal_option: Re-franchise under then-current agreement (may be materially different)

fee_obligations.royalty: 6% of Gross Revenues or minimum monthly ($350-$500)
fee_obligations.holdover_surcharge: $200/month if operating past term without re-franchising
fee_obligations.post_term_additional_royalty: $200/month if continuing to operate after term expiration

site_and_construction.retail_site_review: Franchisor has right to review proposed location (not select or approve)
site_and_construction.site_deadline: 90 days from Franchise Agreement date (with 90-day extension if operating mobile in meantime)
site_and_construction.signage_requirement: Must purchase from approved supplier within 30 days of signing

training_obligations.mandatory_initial: Owner or manager must attend and complete before operating
training_obligations.deadline: 60 days after signing (glass replacement may be deferred 60 days after glass repair)
training_obligations.ongoing_mandatory: Must attend all additional/advanced training we require
training_obligations.meeting_attendance: Must attend all national, regional, and state meetings
training_obligations.employee_training: At least 50% of employees must complete training programs

operational_obligations.full_time_devotion: Owner or manager must devote full-time best efforts
operational_obligations.minimum_employees: At least 1 full-time employee performing/marketing glass services
operational_obligations.computer_system_access: Franchisor has independent access to franchisee computer system
operational_obligations.reporting: Monthly Gross Revenues reports required; withholding access = $100 fee (increasing 25%/year)
operational_obligations.insurance_requirements: GL ($1M/$2M), Garage Keepers ($2M), Vehicle ($1M), Property (replacement value), Umbrella ($1M), Workers Comp ($1M), Environmental ($1M)
operational_obligations.digital_marketing: $500/month minimum spend with designated supplier after 6 months

curable_defaults_30_days: Material breach of any agreement with franchisor or affiliates
Failure to conform to business system
Failure to pay for startup items
curable_defaults_15_days: Failure to make vehicle lease payments
curable_defaults_90_days: Failure to meet Quarterly Minimum Gross Revenues
non_curable_defaults: Felony conviction or violation of law relating to business
Failure to meet Annual Minimum GR (Repair Only)
Failure to comply with audit request
termination_triggers.cross_default: Breach of any franchise agreement, development agreement, vehicle lease, equipment lease, or software sublicense triggers cross-default
termination_triggers.procolor_cross_default: Breach of ProColor franchise agreement = breach of Novus agreement and vice versa

conditions: Sign general release (subject to state law)

noncompete.during_term: No participation in any competing business
noncompete.post_term: 2 years within territory, territory of another franchisee, or 10 miles of any Novus business

guaranty_scope.who_must_sign: Each individual with direct or indirect ownership interest that franchisor designates
guaranty_scope.scope: All obligations of franchisee under all agreements (including noncompete and confidentiality)

liquidated_damages.on_abandonment: 60 months x average monthly Gross Revenues (or remaining term months if <60)

dispute_resolution.mediation_location: At least 200 miles from either office (mediator selects)

indemnification.wa_override: No obligation for franchisor's negligence, willful misconduct, or fraud

force_majeure.note: Not specifically addressed in Item 17 summary. Would require reading full agreement text.

distinctive_clauses.description: Prohibits using confidential information for machine learning, AI training, or generative AI without express written consent
Franchisee vehicle sublease terminates automatically if Mondofix USA master lease terminates
Franchisor has independent access to all information on franchisee's computer system
Must refer customers to nearest Novus business for services franchisee doesn't offer, before referring elsewhere
Franchisor may take phone numbers, directory listings, domain names, and social media accounts on termination
$200/month additional royalty if operating past term without re-franchising
